overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior in full armor running through a snowy winter landscape at night, approaching and entering a traditional Japanese farmhouse. The scene features heavy snowfall, blue moonlight, and warm interior lighting contrasting with the cold exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy field with distant mountain view

agents.ego_description: samurai character wearing horned armor and carrying a bow runs steadily through deep snow in an open field

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain visible in the distance against the night sky
traditional Japanese farmhouse with snow-covered roof in the middle distance
bare winter trees scattered across the snowy landscape
deep snow covering the path and surrounding field

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs through an open snowy field at night, with a majestic snow-capped mountain visible in the distance. Sparse leafless trees dot the landscape, and a distant farmhouse sits on the horizon. Heavy snow falls steadily as the character moves forward through the deep snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy trail through sparse winter woodland

events.description: location text 'KUBARA CROSSING' appears in the lower right corner

agents.ego_description: character continues running through denser vegetation and trees, moving away from the open field toward a more enclosed area

entered.detail: large boulder covered in snow on the right side of the path
tall grass and bushes covered in snow flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from open field to a more enclosed trail surrounded by snow-covered bushes and rocks. The mountain fades from view as the character moves through denser winter vegetation, with trees now closer to the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside traditional Japanese farmhouse with exterior lighting

events.description: warm lantern light from the farmhouse becomes visible, contrasting with the blue moonlight on snow

agents.ego_description: samurai runs along the side of a large traditional farmhouse, passing stone lanterns and approaching the entrance

entered.detail: large two-story wooden farmhouse with snow-covered roof and lit paper lanterns
traditional stone lantern on a wooden post illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs alongside a large traditional Japanese farmhouse, with warm lantern light glowing from the windows and entrance. Stone lanterns line the snow-covered path, and the building's wooden architecture becomes prominent as the character approaches the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of wooden farmhouse with lit paper lanterns

events.description: character enters the farmhouse transitioning from snowy exterior to warm interior space

agents.ego_description: samurai enters the farmhouse and approaches the occupants sitting inside the warm interior

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting on the wooden floor inside the house near a lit lantern

entered.detail: polished wooden floorboards inside the farmhouse entrance
warm glowing paper lantern hanging inside the entrance
traditional paper screen doors with wooden frames in the interior

segments.scene_description: The samurai enters the farmhouse, transitioning from the cold blue snowscape to the warm amber-lit interior. Inside, wooden floors and paper screens define the space, while two villagers sit on the floor near a glowing lantern. The snowfall is no longer visible as the character moves deeper into the shelter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, frozen wilderness into the intimate warmth of a traditional Japanese home. It begins with a samurai running through an open snowy field under a night sky, with a majestic snow-capped mountain looming in the distance. As the character advances, the wide landscape narrows into an enclosed trail where the mountain fades and dense winter vegetation and snow-covered rocks crowd the path. The scene then shifts toward a large farmhouse, where the cold blue moonlight gives way to the warm glow of lanterns lining a stone path and illuminating the wooden architecture. Finally, the camera follows the samurai inside, transitioning from the heavy snowfall into an amber-lit interior of wooden floors and paper screens where villagers wait by a glowing lantern.
